repository.name: higgins-decomposition
repository.next_push_summary: HCI-CNT migration into Hs repo — engine 2.0.4 / schema 2.1.0 / 25 experiments / 3 handbook volumes / CodaWork 2026 demo + slide deck

description.short: Higgins Decomposition (Hˢ) — compositional inference on the simplex. A deterministic 12-step pipeline for reading the geometric fingerprint of any compositional system.
description.one_line_seo: A mathematical tool for compositional data analysis — reads structure on the simplex without creating or destroying it
description.about: Compositional inference engine operating on the Aitchison simplex. 18 domains tested, 44 orders of magnitude, 5 languages.

social_preview.note: Create an image showing the Hˢ symbol with the tagline. Recommended: 1280x640px, dark background, gold Hˢ symbol, subtitle 'Compositional Inference on the Simplex'.

seo_notes.hausdorff_disambiguation: The symbol Hˢ may overlap with the Hausdorff measure H^s in fractal geometry. This is a different mathematical domain (measure theory vs compositional data analysis). The README explicitly defines Hˢ on first use to prevent confusion.
seo_notes.unity_avoidance: The parent project was called 'Higgins Unity Framework' which was confused with the Unity game engine. This repository uses 'Higgins Decomposition' exclusively — no reference to 'Unity' in the name, description, or primary documentation.

HCI-CNT.purpose: Compositional Navigation Tensor — deterministic, hash-chained, 4-stage paged report system
HCI-CNT.license: Apache-2.0 (separate license grant within the parent CC-BY-4.0 repo)
HCI-CNT.license_note: HCI-CNT/ subfolder ships under Apache-2.0 to enable commercial use; the parent Hs repo remains CC-BY-4.0 for the research content.
